name: Mushroom Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried mushrooms in a quart of hot water for several hours.
2. Drain the mushrooms and reserve the liquid (about 2 cups).
3. Strain the liquid through cheesecloth.
4. Simmer the reserved liquid until it is reduced by slightly more than half.
5. Thoroughly slice the fresh mushrooms.
6. Sauté the minced onion in butter until transparent.
7. Add the sliced fresh mushrooms and cook over medium-low heat until they have released their excess water and are starting to evaporate.
8. Season with thyme, salt, and pepper.
9. Add the soaked mushroom strips and reduce the heat if necessary.
10. Gradually whisk the strained liquid into the sour cream.
11. Mix in the brandy and sherry.
12. Cook the noodles in salted water until just tender but not yet soft.
13. Serve with stroganoff sauce and a crisp salad.
